name: No Bake Best Blueberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the berries evenly in the pie shell.
2. In a 4-cup glass measure, mix together sugar, cornstarch, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Stir in water until well combined.
4. Microwave uncovered on high, stirring every minute for 3 to 4 minutes or until thickened and clear.
5. Add sherry and lemon juice; stir.
6. Pour the fruit mixture into the pie shell.
7. Refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve with sour cream topping:
1. Mix 1 cup sour cream, 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
